title: iberis saxatilis var. subvelutina
intro: Iberis saxatilis var. subvelutina, also known as the rock cress or dwarf rock cress, is a variety of flowering plant in the mustard family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress, and improving respiratory function. The plant is commonly used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
